sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. The patient reports stomach pain. The patient reports burning pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. The patient's lymph nodes are swollen.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has chronic kidney disease. The patient has diabetes. The patient has hypertension. The patient's grandfather had obstructive neuropathy. The patient's mother had breast cancer.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor recommends using Tylenol instead of ibuprofen. The doctor recommends Gatorade and water. The doctor recommends follow-up with a primary care physician or a nephrologist. The doctor recommends annual ultrasound and urinalysis.
